name: @gaberrb/polypus-chrome
description: Polypus Web Agent — Chrome extension for browser-based AI agent actions
author: Gabriel Rios

scripts.package: npm run build && node -e "const{cpSync,existsSync,mkdirSync}=require('fs');const{join}=require('path');const d=join(__dirname,'dist');if(!existsSync(d))mkdirSync(d);cpSync(join(__dirname,'manifest.json'),join(d,'manifest.json'),{recursive:true});const i=join(d,'icons');if(!existsSync(i))mkdirSync(i);require('fs').readdirSync(join(__dirname,'icons')).forEach(f=>cpSync(join(__dirname,'icons',f),join(i,f)));console.log('✓ copied manifest + icons') "
